functions.name: starmap_client.utils.assert_is_dict
documentation: Ensure the incoming data is a dictionary, raises `ValueError` if not.

functions.name: starmap_client.utils.dict_merge
documentation:
Return a new dictionary with the combination of A and B.

Args:
    a (dict):
        The left dictionary to be combined
    b (dict):
        The right dictionary to be combined. It will override the same keys from A.
Returns:
    dict: A new dictionary with combination of A and B.

classes.name: starmap_client.session.StarmapSession

methods.name: starmap_client.session.StarmapSession.__init__
documentation:
Create the StarmapSession object.

Args:
    url (str)
        The StArMap server endpoint base URL
    api_version
        The StArMap server API version to call
    retries (int, optional)
        The number of request retries on failure
    backoff_factor (float, optional)
        The backoff factor to apply between attempts after the second try

methods.name: starmap_client.session.StarmapSession._request

modules.name: starmap_client.client
documentation: SPDX-License-Identifier: GPL-3.0-or-later

classes.name: starmap_client.client.StarmapClient

methods.name: starmap_client.client.StarmapClient.__init__
documentation:
Create a new StArMapClient.

Args:
    url (str, optional)
        URL of the StArMap endpoint. Required when session is not set.

    api_version (str, optional)
        The StArMap API version. Defaults to `v2`.
    session (StarmapBaseSession, optional)
        Defines the session object to use. Defaults to `StarmapSession` when not set
    session_params (dict, optional)
        Additional keyword arguments for StarmapSession
    provider (StarmapProvider, optional):
        Object responsible to provide mappings locally. When set the client will be query it
        first and if no mapping is found the subsequent request will be made to the server.

methods.name: starmap_client.client.StarmapClient.query_image
documentation:
Query StArMap using an image NVR.

Args:
    nvr (str): The image archive name or NVR.
    workflow(Workflow, optional): The desired workflow to retrieve the mappings (APIv1 Only)

Returns:
    Q: The query result when found or None.

methods.name: starmap_client.client.StarmapClient.query_image_by_name
documentation:
Query StArMap using an image NVR.

Args:
    name (str): The image name from NVR.
    version (str, optional): The version from NVR.
    workflow(Workflow, optional): The desired workflow to retrieve the mappings (APIv1 Only)

Returns:
    Q: The query result when found or None.

methods.name: starmap_client.client.StarmapClient.policies
documentation: Iterate over all Policies registered in StArMap.

methods.name: starmap_client.client.StarmapClient.list_policies
documentation:
List all Policies present in StArMap.

Returns:
    list(Policy): List with all policies present in StArMap.

methods.name: starmap_client.client.StarmapClient.get_policy
documentation:
Retrieve a single policy by its ID.

Args:
    policy_id (str): The Policy ID to retrieve from StArMap.

Returns:
    Policy: The requested Policy when found.

methods.name: starmap_client.client.StarmapClient.list_mappings
documentation:
List all mappings for a given Policy ID.

Args:
    policy_id (str)
        Policy ID to list the mappings.

Returns:
    List with the Mappings for the requested Policy.

methods.name: starmap_client.client.StarmapClient.get_mapping
documentation:
Retrieve a single Marketplace Mapping by its ID.

Args:
    mapping_id (str)
        The Markeplace Mapping ID to retrieve from StArmAp.

Returns:
    The requested Marketplace Mapping when found.

methods.name: starmap_client.client.StarmapClient.list_destinations
documentation:
List all destinations for a given Marketplace Mapping ID.

Args:
    mapping_id (str)
        Marketplace Mapping ID to list the mappings.

Returns:
    List with the Destinations for the requested Mapping.

methods.name: starmap_client.client.StarmapClient.get_destination
documentation:
Retrieve a single Destination by its ID.

Args:
    destination_id (str)
        The Destination ID to retrieve from StArmAp.

Returns:
    The requested Destination when found.

class_variables.name: starmap_client.client.StarmapClient.POLICIES_PER_PAGE
documentation: Number of policies to retrieve per call.
Implement the StArMap client.

modules.name: starmap_client.providers.utils
documentation: SPDX-License-Identifier: GPL-3.0-or-later
The functions below were adapted from Kobo's RPMLib:
https://github.com/release-engineering/kobo/blob/master/kobo/rpmlib.py

functions.name: starmap_client.providers.utils.split_nvr_epoch
documentation:
Split nvre to N-V-R and E.

```
param nvre

E:N-V-R or N-V-R:E string

return

(N-V-R, E)
```

functions.name: starmap_client.providers.utils.parse_nvr
documentation:
Split N-V-R into a dictionary.

```
param nvre

N-V-R:E, E:N-V-R or N-E:V-R string

return

{name, version, release, epoch}
```

functions.name: starmap_client.providers.utils.get_image_name
documentation: Retrieve the name from NVR.

classes.name: starmap_client.providers.memory.InMemoryMapProviderV1

methods.name: starmap_client.providers.memory.InMemoryMapProviderV1.__init__
documentation:
Crete a new InMemoryMapProvider object.

Args:
    map_responses (list, optional)
        List of QueryResponse objects to load into memory. They will be
        used by query to fetch the correct response based on name
        and workflow.

methods.name: starmap_client.providers.memory.InMemoryMapProviderV1._boostrap
documentation:
Initialize the internal content dictionary.

Args:
    map_responses (list, optional)
        List of QueryResponse objects to load into memory.

documentation: Return a list of stored content.

methods.name: starmap_client.providers.memory.InMemoryMapProviderV1.store
documentation:
Store/replace a single QueryResponse object.

Args:
    response (QueryResponse):
        The object to store.

methods.name: starmap_client.providers.memory.InMemoryMapProviderV1.query
documentation:
Return the mapping from memory according to the received params.

Args:
    params (dict):
        The request params to retrieve the mapping.
Returns:
    The requested mapping when found.
Provide in memory (RAM) QueryResponse mapping objects for APIv1.

classes.name: starmap_client.providers.memory.InMemoryMapProviderV2

methods.name: starmap_client.providers.memory.InMemoryMapProviderV2.__init__
documentation:
Crete a new InMemoryMapProvider object.

Args:
    container (QueryResponseContainer)
        QueryResponseContainer object to load into memory. It will be
        used by query to return the correct response based on name
        and workflow.

methods.name: starmap_client.providers.memory.InMemoryMapProviderV2.query
documentation:
Retrieve the mapping without using the server.

It relies in the local provider to retrieve the correct mappings
according to the parameters.

Args:
    params (dict):
        The request params to retrieve the mapping.
Returns:
    The requested container with mappings when found.

methods.name: starmap_client.providers.memory.InMemoryMapProviderV2.list_content
documentation: Return a the responses stored in the container.

methods.name: starmap_client.providers.memory.InMemoryMapProviderV2.store
documentation:
Store a single response into the local provider's container.

Args:
    container (container):
        The container to store.
Provide in memory (RAM) QueryResponseContainer objects for APIv2.

classes.name: starmap_client.models.StarmapJSONDecodeMixin

methods.name: starmap_client.models.StarmapJSONDecodeMixin._assert_json_dict
documentation:
Ensure the given JSON is an instance of `dict`.

Args:
    json (Any)
        A JSON containing a StArMap response.

methods.name: starmap_client.models.StarmapJSONDecodeMixin._preprocess_json
documentation:
Preprocess the JSON before converting it to class object.

It's intended to be overriden by base classes which needs to do it.

Args:
    json (dict)
        A JSON containing a StArMap response.
Returns:
    dict: The modified JSON.

documentation:
Convert a JSON dictionary into class object.

Args:
    json (dict)
        A JSON containing a StArMap response.
Returns:
    The converted object from JSON.
Implement the default JSON deserialization for StArMap models.

classes.name: starmap_client.models.QueryResponseContainer

methods.name: starmap_client.models.QueryResponseContainer.from_json
documentation:
Convert the APIv2 response JSON into this object.

Args:
    json (list)
        A JSON containing a StArMap APIv2 response.
Returns:
    The converted object from JSON.

methods.name: starmap_client.models.QueryResponseContainer.filter_by_name
documentation:
Return a sublist of the responses with only the selected image name.

Args:
    name (str):
        The image name to filter the list of responses
    responses (list, optional):
        List of existing responses to filter. Default by the container's own list.
Returns:
    list: The sublist with only the selected image name.

methods.name: starmap_client.models.QueryResponseContainer.filter_by_workflow
documentation:
Return a sublist of the responses with only the selected workflow.

Args:
    workflow (Workflow):
        The workflow to filter the list of responses
    responses (list, optional):
        List of existing responses to filter. Default by the container's own list.
Returns:
    list: The sublist with only the selected workflows

methods.name: starmap_client.models.QueryResponseContainer.filter_by_cloud
documentation:
Return a sublist of the responses with only the selected cloud name.

Args:
    cloud (str):
        The cloud name to filter the list of responses
    responses (list, optional):
        List of existing responses to filter. Default by the container's own list.
Returns:
    list: The sublist with only the selected cloud name.

methods.name: starmap_client.models.QueryResponseContainer.filter_by
documentation: Return a sublist of the responses with the selected filters.

class_variables.name: starmap_client.models.QueryResponseContainer.responses
documentation: List with all responses from a Query V2 mapping.
Represent a full query response from APIv2.
